name: account-deletion
description: Confirms a deletion request with a grace period.
subject: Your {{ product }} account will be deleted
html_body:
Deletion scheduled — you can still undo this.
{{ product }}

Account deletion scheduled

Hi {{ name }}, we received the request to delete your {{ product }} account. Your data will be permanently removed in {{ grace_days }} days.

Changed your mind? You can cancel any time before then:

Keep my account

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

After the grace period this cannot be undone.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

Your {{ product }} account is scheduled for deletion. All data will be permanently
removed in {{ grace_days }} days.

Changed your mind? Cancel here: {{ action_url }}

After the grace period this cannot be undone.

name: comment-reply
description: New reply in a thread the user participates in.
subject: New reply from {{ author }} in {{ context }}
html_body:
New reply in your thread.
{{ product }}

New reply in {{ context }}

{{ author }} replied:

{{ excerpt }}
Open the thread

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: data-export-ready
description: Requested export finished; expiring download link.
subject: Your {{ product }} data export is ready
html_body:
Your download is ready.
{{ product }}

Your export is ready

Hi {{ name }}, the data export you requested is ready to download.

Download export

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

For your security the download link expires in {{ expires_in }}.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

Your {{ product }} data export is ready:

{{ action_url }}

The link expires in {{ expires_in }}.

name: email-verification
description: Confirms the user owns the address; link + short expiry note.
subject: Verify your email address
html_body:
Confirm your address to finish signing up.
{{ product }}

Verify your email

Hi {{ name }}, please confirm this email address for your {{ product }} account.

Verify email address

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

This link expires in {{ expires_in }}. If you didn't create an account, you can ignore this email.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

Please confirm this email address for your {{ product }} account:

{{ action_url }}

The link expires in {{ expires_in }}. If you didn't create an account, ignore this email.

name: magic-link
description: Passwordless sign-in link.
subject: Your sign-in link for {{ product }}
html_body:
Tap to sign in — no password needed.
{{ product }}

Sign in to {{ product }}

Use the button below to sign in. No password needed.

Sign in

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

You receive this because it concerns the security of your {{ product }} account. The link expires in {{ expires_in }} and can be used once.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: mention-notification
description: Someone mentioned the user; quote + deep link.
subject: {{ author }} mentioned you in {{ context }}
html_body:
You were mentioned.
{{ product }}

{{ author }} mentioned you

In {{ context }}:

{{ excerpt }}
View and reply

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: new-device-login
description: Alert for a sign-in from a new device or location.
subject: New sign-in to your {{ product }} account
html_body:
New device sign-in detected.
{{ product }}

New sign-in detected

Hi {{ name }}, your {{ product }} account was just signed in from a new device:

Time{{ when }}
Device{{ device }}
Location{{ location }}
IP address{{ ip_address }}

If this was you, no action is needed.

Secure my account

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

You receive this because it concerns the security of your {{ product }} account.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: order-confirmation
description: Order received; items table via {{#items}} section.
subject: Order {{ order_number }} confirmed
html_body:
We've received your order.
{{ product }}

Thanks for your order, {{ name }}!

We've received order {{ order_number }} and will let you know as soon as it ships.

{{#items}}{{/items}}
{{ name }} × {{ quantity }}{{ price }}
Total{{ total }}
View your order

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: password-changed
description: Security notice after a successful password change.
subject: Your {{ product }} password was changed
html_body:
If this was you, no action is needed.
{{ product }}

Password changed

Hi {{ name }}, the password of your {{ product }} account was changed on {{ when }} (IP {{ ip_address }}).

If this was you, no action is needed. All other sessions were signed out.

Wasn't you? Reset your password immediately and contact us at {{ support_email }}.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

Your {{ product }} password was changed on {{ when }} (IP {{ ip_address }}).
All other sessions were signed out.

If this wasn't you, reset your password immediately and contact {{ support_email }}.

name: password-reset
description: Reset link with expiry; safe to ignore if not requested.
subject: Reset your {{ product }} password
html_body:
Choose a new password.
{{ product }}

Reset your password

Hi {{ name }}, we received a request to reset the password of your {{ product }} account.

Choose a new password

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

You receive this because it concerns the security of your {{ product }} account. The link expires in {{ expires_in }}. If you didn't request a reset, your password is unchanged and you can ignore this email.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

We received a request to reset your {{ product }} password. Choose a new one here:

{{ action_url }}

The link expires in {{ expires_in }}. If you didn't request this, your password is unchanged.

name: payment-failed
description: Dunning: charge failed, retry date, update-payment CTA.
subject: Action needed: payment for {{ product }} failed
html_body:
We couldn't process your payment.
{{ product }}

Payment failed

Hi {{ name }}, we couldn't charge {{ amount }} for your {{ product }} subscription.

We'll retry on {{ retry_date }}. To avoid any interruption, please check your payment details:

Update payment method

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Already fixed it? Then you're all set — we'll retry automatically.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

We couldn't charge {{ amount }} for your {{ product }} subscription.
We'll retry on {{ retry_date }}.

Update your payment method to avoid interruption: {{ action_url }}

name: payment-receipt
description: Payment succeeded; amounts, invoice number, download link.
subject: Receipt: {{ amount }} for {{ product }}
html_body:
Your payment went through.
{{ product }}

Payment received

Hi {{ name }}, thanks! We've received your payment.

Amount{{ amount }}
Invoice{{ invoice_number }}
Date{{ date }}
Payment method{{ payment_method }}
Download invoice

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: refund-processed
description: Refund issued; amount and arrival window.
subject: Your refund of {{ amount }} is on its way
html_body:
Refund processed.
{{ product }}

Refund processed

Hi {{ name }}, we've refunded {{ amount }} for order {{ order_number }}.

Depending on your bank it will appear on your statement within {{ arrival_window }}.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

We've refunded {{ amount }} for order {{ order_number }}.
It will appear on your statement within {{ arrival_window }}.

name: shipping-notification
description: Order shipped; carrier + tracking link.
subject: Your order {{ order_number }} has shipped 📦
html_body:
It's on the way.
{{ product }}

Your order is on its way

Hi {{ name }}, order {{ order_number }} has shipped.

Carrier{{ carrier }}
Tracking number{{ tracking_number }}
Estimated arrival{{ eta }}
Track your package

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: subscription-cancelled
description: Cancellation confirmed; access end date; resubscribe link.
subject: Your {{ product }} subscription is cancelled
html_body:
Cancellation confirmed.
{{ product }}

Subscription cancelled

Hi {{ name }}, your {{ plan }} subscription is cancelled. You keep full access until {{ access_until }}.

Changed your mind? You can resume any time before then:

Resume subscription

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: subscription-renewal
description: Upcoming renewal notice with amount and date.
subject: Your {{ product }} plan renews on {{ renewal_date }}
html_body:
Heads-up: your subscription renews soon.
{{ product }}

Renewal ahead

Hi {{ name }}, your {{ plan }} plan renews on {{ renewal_date }} for {{ amount }}.

Nothing to do if you want to keep it — this is just the heads-up.

Manage subscription

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Hi {{ name }},

Your {{ plan }} plan renews on {{ renewal_date }} for {{ amount }}.
Nothing to do if you want to keep it.

Manage your subscription: {{ action_url }}

name: team-invitation
description: Invite to a team/workspace with inviter context.
subject: {{ inviter }} invited you to {{ team }} on {{ product }}
html_body:
You've been invited to join a team.
{{ product }}

Join {{ team }}

{{ inviter }} invited you to join {{ team }} on {{ product }} as {{ role }}.

Accept invitation

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

The invitation expires in {{ expires_in }}. If you weren't expecting it, you can ignore this email.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: trial-ending
description: Trial expiry reminder with upgrade CTA.
subject: Your {{ product }} trial ends in {{ days_left }} days
html_body:
Don't lose access to your work.
{{ product }}

{{ days_left }} days left in your trial

Hi {{ name }}, your {{ product }} trial ends in {{ days_left }} days. Pick a plan to keep everything running without interruption.

Choose a plan

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

Questions about plans? Just reply — happy to help.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

name: two-factor-code
description: One-time security code (login step-up, sensitive action).
subject: {{ code }} is your {{ product }} security code
html_body:
Your one-time code.
{{ product }}

Your security code

Enter this code to continue. It expires in {{ expires_in }}.

{{ code }}

You receive this because it concerns the security of your {{ product }} account. Never share this code — {{ product }} will never ask for it.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Your {{ product }} security code: {{ code }}

It expires in {{ expires_in }}. Never share this code — {{ product }} will never ask for it.

name: welcome
description: Sent right after signup: greets the user and points at the first action.
subject: Welcome to {{ product }}, {{ name }}!
html_body:
Your account is ready.
{{ product }}

Welcome aboard, {{ name }} 👋

Your {{ product }} account is ready. The best way to start is to jump right in:

Get started

Or copy this link into your browser:
{{ action_url }}

If you have any questions, just reply — a human reads these.

Questions? Just reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.
text_body:
Welcome aboard, {{ name }}!

Your {{ product }} account is ready. Get started here:

{{ action_url }}

Questions? Just reply to this email or write to {{ support_email }}.
